styles.name: Buzz Cut
styles.description: Ultra-short, even length all over. Highlights facial structure and works best when you want a sharp, low-maintenance look. Virtually no styling needed.

styles.name: Crew Cut
styles.description: Short, practical cut with a slightly longer top and clean sides. Gives a neat, athletic look without adding much visual weight. Very low styling effort.

styles.name: Side Part
styles.description: Classic side-parted style with controlled shape and clean separation. Adds structure and polish, especially for formal or smart-casual looks. Medium styling effort.

styles.name: Comb Over
styles.description: Side-swept style with sharper faded sides and a structured finish. Creates a cleaner, more defined silhouette with noticeable contrast. Medium styling effort.

styles.name: Slick Back
styles.description: Hair styled backward away from the forehead with a sleek finish. Emphasizes facial structure and gives a clean, mature appearance. Medium styling effort.

styles.name: Pompadour
styles.description: High-volume top swept upward and back. Creates a bold, elongated silhouette and works best when extra height is desired. High styling effort.

styles.name: Quiff
styles.description: Lifted front with controlled texture and shorter sides. Adds height and structure, best for faces that benefit from vertical emphasis. Moderate styling effort.

styles.name: Classic Undercut
styles.description: Disconnected cut with a longer top and very short sides. Creates strong contrast and a sharper modern outline. Moderate styling effort.

styles.name: Textured Fringe
styles.description: Textured top with hair falling forward into a fringe. Adds softness around the forehead and works well for longer or narrower faces. Low to moderate styling effort.

styles.name: Messy Crop
styles.description: Short crop with textured movement and a soft forward fringe. Adds casual shape while helping soften the forehead area. Low styling effort.

styles.name: French Crop
styles.description: Short cropped cut with a defined forward fringe. Helps visually shorten longer face shapes and soften the forehead area. Low styling effort.

styles.name: Curly Volume
styles.description: Natural curly style shaped with fuller sides and controlled volume. Adds width, texture, and movement while keeping the look relaxed. Medium styling effort.

styles.name: Layered Medium
styles.description: Medium-length cut with natural layers and movement. Adds softness and side balance without looking too heavy. Low to moderate styling effort.

styles.name: Bro Flow
styles.description: Medium-to-long flow with natural movement away from the face. Creates a relaxed look and works best with thicker or wavy hair. Low styling effort.

styles.name: Long Straight
styles.description: Long straight hair with minimal layering. Creates a clean, simple silhouette but may visually elongate the face. Higher maintenance required.
